choices: Zavok risks it by sticking around to watch the transformation finish
Zavok takes off as the officer goes back to the base
Zavok and the soldier are both captured by GUN as expiriments are performed
In the base GUN grows aware of the transformation process thanks to Zeena
1.content:
Zavok grew frustrated as he may have managed to track down his team after the events of Bad Guys (IDW mini series) however he was a much weaker state than desirable with a simple Eggman badnik under his control as he snuck around the jungle on Prison Island as the remnants of GUN reformed together after the events of Forces there and managed to find and imprison each Zeti besides Zavok after the Zombot crisis and even fitted control collars onto each of them that they couldn’t resist at the moment each was put on due to their weakened states but now they were fully recuperated and ready to serve GUN however the organization pleased which drove the red leader mad. “How could we have fallen so hard like this to the point even weak humans could enslave us?!” Zavok would constantly ponder that question in his head as he peaked over at the facility where his first target to free was being held: Zeena.

Zeena was many things but he most notable trait was her vanity that was able to shiny through even the collar’s control which Zavok hoped to use to his advantage in order to free her and thus the others however the plan seemingly fell apart almost immediately when he was suddenly pounced upon in the brush by a single female GUN soldier who had noticed him earlier thanks to the badnik but went in alone not only being a bit too arrogant about her skills but thinking capturing the last Zeti by herself could fetch her a nice promotion and a reputation among the ranks. “You are under arrest!” The officer yelled as she started to pull out her weapon to point at Zavok who made a defensive move he had never pulled in desperation to save himself: he bit her arm. “AH YOU STUPID MONSTER!” The officer managed to pull away from the Zeti who tried to crawl away and order the badnik to keep her from letting her get on him again but she was more focused on looking at the wounded arm that now bled but the entire arm itself was red even where the blood didn’t reach. “What...did you do?!” She was growing confused as she started to stumble and her vision blurred while walking toward Zavok who only watched in confusion as the redness started to spread over her body with a tail breaking through her pants once all of her skin tone was changed. Zavok could stay and watch the process continue but he realized the soldiers likely noticed her disappearance and could be there any moment...
1.title: The beginning

info.brief_description: Zavok discovers he can convert other beings into Zeti and chaos ensues
info.description:
This story revolves around Zavok and the six using this new discovery to infect others changing them into Zeti in order to take over the planet.
Ground rules:

No diapers, watersports, inflation, shrinkage, giganticification, foot fetish, etc

This story focuses on Zavok and the six so try to not stray away from them for too long

Sex is allowed just keep it between two characters of age

Gender and age are things that can be changed in the process of becoming a zeti as well as sexual orientation not to mention said victims become subservient to the Deadly Six

The story will have a mix of characters from the different Sonic canons like game, IDW, Archie, etc try to make sure you are familiar with the characters before writing a chapter with them featured.

I can edit or delete chapters as I see fit you can ask why I may do it but be civil

With all that in mind I hope we all can enjoy writing in this story and feel free to give feedback.
